canonical_definition: A benchmark of 851 samples designed to evaluate multimodal long-document understanding through open-ended question answering over real-world documents spanning hundreds of pages, with questions requiring in-depth reasoning across text, figures, and tables.
papers: VLASCD: A Visual Language Action Model for Simultaneous Chatting and Decision Making

definitions.text: A benchmark of 851 samples designed to evaluate multimodal long-document understanding through open-ended question answering over real-world documents spanning hundreds of pages, with questions requiring in-depth reasoning across text, figures, and tables.
definitions.paper: VLASCD: A Visual Language Action Model for Simultaneous Chatting and Decision Making

relationships.paper: VLASCD: A Visual Language Action Model for Simultaneous Chatting and Decision Making
relationships.evidence: To evaluate the multimodal document understanding ability of existing models, we present M-LongDoc, a challenging and diverse benchmark.

emnlp25: VLASCD: A Visual Language Action Model for Simultaneous Chatting and Decision Making

relationships.paper: VLASCD: A Visual Language Action Model for Simultaneous Chatting and Decision Making
relationships.evidence: With the proposed M-LongDoc and evaluation framework, our preliminary study on existing models show that they struggle with figure and table-based questions compared to text-based questions, revealing their multimodal bias and weaknesses
